payload.title: Define Reproducible Core State Epic

payload.evidence: E15 plan contains cause-and-effect analysis, ordered work items, alternatives, horizons, proof, non-goals, risks, and an explicit execution boundary; docs contract suite and git diff check passed.

payload.actions_taken: ["Inspected existing state/replay architecture; compared implementation paths; documented automatic capture","revision guards","snapshot materialization","worktree recovery","and CI proof; validated documentation."]
payload.decisions_made: ["Keep writable databases worktree-local; make mutation capture automatic in source mode; add revision guards before snapshot activation; let agents resolve reported semantic conflicts; keep compaction out of normal tasks."]
payload.errors: ["Initial story update used positional id; CLI rejected it","then the command was rerun with --id."]

payload.harness_friction: Mandatory bootstrap remains blocked by existing backlog #19 because active durable state contains out-of-scope Symphony product work; used the existing owner database without modifying that unrelated state.
